The KOALA benchmarks perform a variety of common shell tasks; they combine all major language features of the POSIX shell; they use a variety of POSIX, GNU Coreutils, and third-party components; and they operate on inputs of varying size and composition—available on both permanent archival storage and scalable cloud storage. Applying KOALA to four systems aimed at accelerating shell programs offers a broader perspective on their trade-offs, generalizes their key results, and contributes to a better understanding of these systems.
items.abstract_zh: KOALA 是一个基准测试套件，旨在针对 Unix 和 Linux shell 进行面向性能的研究。它结合了从野外发现的任务中收集的各种 shell 程序的系统集合、这些程序的各种实际输入，以促进小型和大型部署、帮助理解的广泛分析和表征，以及旨在系统研究中的可用性和可重复性的附加基础设施和工具。 KOALA 基准测试执行各种常见的 shell 任务；它们结合了 POSIX shell 的所有主要语言功能；他们使用各种 POSIX、GNU Coreutils 和第三方组件；它们对不同大小和组成的输入进行操作——可在永久档案存储和可扩展的云存储上使用。将 KOALA 应用于旨在加速 shell 程序的四个系统，为它们的权衡提供了更广阔的视角，概括了它们的关键结果，并有助于更好地理解这些系统。

items.title: IRHash: Efficient Multi-Language Compiler Caching by IR-Level Hashing.
items.abstract: Compilation caches (CCs) save time, energy, and money by avoiding redundant compilations. They are provided by means of compiler wrappers (Ccache, sccache, cHash) or native build system features (Bazel, Buck2). Conceptually, a CC pays off if the achieved savings by cache hits outweigh the extra costs for cache lookups. Thus, most techniques try to detect a cache hit early in the compilation process by hashing the (preprocessed/tokenized) source code, but hashing the AST has also been suggested to achieve even higher end-to-end savings, as the increased accuracy outweighs the additional parsing costs. Technically, all these CCs are currently limited to C or C-style languages. In this paper we take the conceptual question of the “right” lookup level for compiler caches one step further onto the IR level. We provide IRHash, an IR-level CC for LLVM that not only offers higher accuracy than the previous works but can also support all languages with an LLVM backend. We evaluate IRHash against Ccache and cHash based on the development history of 16 open-source projects written in C, C++, Fortran, and Haskell. With an average build time reduction of 19% across all C projects, IRHash provides better end-to-end savings than Ccache (10%) and cHash (16%), while additionally supporting more languages.
items.abstract_zh: 编译缓存 (CC) 通过避免冗余编译来节省时间、精力和金钱。它们通过编译器包装器（Ccache、sccache、cHash）或本机构建系统功能（Bazel、Buck2）提供。从概念上讲，如果缓存命中所节省的成本超过了缓存查找的额外成本，那么 CC 就会获得回报。因此，大多数技术尝试通过对（预处理/标记化）源代码进行散列来在编译过程的早期检测缓存命中，但也有人建议对 AST 进行散列以实现更高的端到端节省，因为提高的准确性超过了额外的解析成本。从技术上讲，所有这些 CC 目前都仅限于 C 或 C 风格语言。在本文中，我们将编译器缓存的“正确”查找级别的概念问题进一步带到了 IR 级别。我们提供IRHash，一个针对LLVM的IR级CC，它不仅比以前的作品提供更高的准确性，而且还可以通过LLVM后端支持所有语言。我们根据 16 个用 C、C++、Fortran 和 Haskell 编写的开源项目的开发历史，针对 Ccache 和 cHash 评估 IRHash。所有 C 项目的平均构建时间减少了 19%，IRHash 提供了比 Ccache (10%) 和 cHash (16%) 更好的端到端节省，同时还支持更多语言。

items.title: Accelerating Distributed Graph Learning by Using Collaborative In-Network Multicast and Aggregation.
items.abstract: Distributed GNN training systems typically partition large graphs into multiple subgraphs and train them across multiple workers to eliminate single-GPU memory limitations. However, the graph propagation in each iteration involves numerous one-to-many multicast and many-to-one aggregation operations across workers, resulting in massive redundant traffic and severe bandwidth bottlenecks. Offloading multicast and aggregation operations into programmable switches has the potential to reduce the traffic volume significantly. Unfortunately, the complex dependencies among graph data and the limited switch-aggregator resources lead to performance degradation. The graph-agnostic sending order results in excessive traffic in multicast operations, leading to a severe backlog. Additionally, a small number of vertices may consume the major part of aggregator resources, while most traffic misses the opportunity for in-network aggregation. To tackle these challenges, we propose SwitchGNN, which accelerates graph learning through coordinated in-network multicast and aggregation. First, to alleviate the link under-utilization and queue backlog, we design a graph-aware multicast reordering algorithm, which prioritizes the upload of multicast vertices with the higher number of neighbors to reduce the communication time. Second, to prevent aggregator overflow, SwitchGNN employs a multi-level graph partitioning mechanism that further partitions boundary vertices into independent blocks to perform in-network aggregation in batches while ensuring the correctness of the graph propagation. We implement SwitchGNN using P4 programmable switch and DPDK host stack. The experimental results of the real testbed and NS3 simulations show that SwitchGNN effectively reduces the communication overhead and speeds up the training time by up to 74%.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式 GNN 训练系统通常将大图划分为多个子图，并在多个工作人员之间进行训练，以消除单 GPU 内存限制。然而，每次迭代中的图传播涉及大量跨worker的一对多多播和多对一聚合操作，导致大量冗余流量和严重的带宽瓶颈。将多播和聚合操作卸载到可编程交换机中可以显着减少流量。不幸的是，图数据之间复杂的依赖关系和有限的交换聚合器资源会导致性能下降。与图无关的发送顺序会导致多播操作中的流量过多，从而导致严重的积压。此外，少量顶点可能会消耗聚合器资源的主要部分，而大多数流量会错过网络内聚合的机会。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 SwitchGNN，它通过协调的网络内多播和聚合来加速图学习。首先，为了缓解链路利用率不足和队列积压，我们设计了一种图感知多播重排序算法，该算法优先上传邻居数量较多的多播顶点，以减少通信时间。其次，为了防止聚合器溢出，SwitchGNN采用了多级图划分机制，将边界顶点进一步划分为独立的块，以批量进行网内聚合，同时保证图传播的正确性。我们使用 P4 可编程交换机和 DPDK 主机堆栈来实现 SwitchGNN。真实测试床和 NS3 模拟的实验结果表明，SwitchGNN 有效降低了通信开销，并将训练时间加快了高达 74%。

items.title: Universal Checkpointing: A Flexible and Efficient Distributed Checkpointing System for Large-Scale DNN Training with Reconfigurable Parallelism.
items.abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) training continues to scale rapidly in terms of model size, data volume, and sequence length, to the point where multiple machines are required to fit large models for training. Different distributed and parallel training strategies have been developed to support large-scale DNN training by partitioning the training state across GPUs. However, existing DNN training systems provide very limited support for reconfiguring parallelism strategies in the middle of the training via checkpointing. This limitation arises because distributed checkpoints are tightly coupled to specific model parallelism and hardware configurations, preventing large-scale training jobs from efficiently adapting to hardware failures or resource elasticity. This paper presents Universal Checkpointing (UCP), a novel checkpointing system that enables flexible and efficient DNN training with reconfigurable parallelism. UCP overcomes challenges in existing systems by decoupling checkpoint structure from parallel training strategies and hardware configurations. In addition, we present a pattern-based reconfiguration pipeline that enables automatic, flexible, and efficient mapping of checkpoint state to various parallelism strategies. Evaluation on a range of DNN models, including state-of-the-art dense and sparse LLMs, shows that UCP enables reconfiguration for a broader set of widely used parallelism strategies than existing solutions while adding negligible reconfiguration cost. UCP has been successfully employed in real LLM training workloads, greatly enhancing their flexibility and resilience to dynamic hardware environments.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练在模型大小、数据量和序列长度方面持续快速扩展，以至于需要多台机器来适应大型模型进行训练。人们已经开发出不同的分布式并行训练策略，通过跨 GPU 划分训练状态来支持大规模 DNN 训练。然而，现有的 DNN 训练系统对于在训练过程中通过检查点重新配置并行策略提供的支持非常有限。出现这种限制的原因是分布式检查点与特定模型并行性和硬件配置紧密耦合，导致大规模训练作业无法有效适应硬件故障或资源弹性。本文提出了通用检查点 (UCP)，这是一种新颖的检查点系统，可通过可重新配置的并行性实现灵活高效的 DNN 训练。 UCP 通过将检查点结构与并行训练策略和硬件配置解耦来克服现有系统中的挑战。此外，我们提出了一种基于模式的重新配置管道，可以自动、灵活且高效地将检查点状态映射到各种并行策略。对一系列 DNN 模型（包括最先进的密集和稀疏 LLM）的评估表明，与现有解决方案相比，UCP 能够针对更广泛的广泛使用的并行策略进行重新配置，同时增加的重新配置成本可以忽略不计。 UCP 已成功应用于真实的 LLM 培训工作负载，极大地增强了其对动态硬件环境的灵活性和弹性。

items.title: Towards Optimal Rack-scale μs-level CPU Scheduling through In-Network Workload Shaping.
items.abstract: Rack-scale CPU scheduling has emerged as a promising direction to accommodate the increasing demands for microsecond-level services. However, prior work suffers from both inaccurate load balancing in the network and complex yet sub-optimal scheduling within each server due primarily to its application-agnosticism. This paper presents Pallas, an application-aware rack-scale CPU scheduling solution for microsecond-level services with near-optimal performance. At the heart of Pallas is an in-network workload shaping to partition the workload into different shards, each of them preserving high homogeneity regarding the CPU demands. With the shaped workloads, Pallas then performs simple yet near-optimal inter-server load balancing and intra-server scheduling. We have fully implemented Pallas and our extensive experiments across various synthetic workloads and real-world applications demonstrate that Pallas significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solution RackSched by delivering stably low tail latency and high throughput, reducing tail latency by 8.5× at medium load and as much as two orders of magnitude at high load, while gracefully handling long-term workload shifts and short-term transient bursts.
items.abstract_zh: 机架级CPU调度已成为满足微秒级服务日益增长的需求的一个有前景的方向。然而，先前的工作受到网络中不准确的负载平衡以及每个服务器内复杂但次优的调度的影响，这主要是由于其应用程序不可知论。本文介绍了 Pallas，这是一种应用感知的机架级 CPU 调度解决方案，适用于微秒级服务，具有接近最佳的性能。 Pallas 的核心是网络内工作负载整形，将工作负载划分为不同的分片，每个分片都保持 CPU 需求的高度同质性。通过调整后的工作负载，Pallas 会执行简单但接近最佳的服务器间负载平衡和服务器内调度。我们已经全面实施了 Pallas，我们在各种合成工作负载和实际应用程序中进行的广泛实验表明，Pallas 能够提供稳定的低尾部延迟和高吞吐量，显着优于最先进的解决方案 RackSched，在中等负载下将尾部延迟减少 8.5 倍，在高负载下减少两个数量级，同时优雅地处理长期工作负载转移和短期瞬态突发。

items.title: DSA-2LM: A CPU-Free Tiered Memory Architecture with Intel DSA.
items.abstract: Tiered Memory is critical to manage heterogeneous memory devices, such as Persistent Memory or CXL Memory. Existing works make difficult trade-offs between optimal data placement and costly data movement. With the advent of Intel Data Streaming Accelerator (DSA), a CPU-free hardware to move data between memory regions, data movement can be up to 4× faster than a single CPU core. However, the fine memory movement granularity in Linux kernel undermines the potential performance improvement. To this end, we have developed DSA-2LM, a new tiered memory system that adaptively integrates DSA into page migration. The proposed framework integrates fast memory migration workflow and adaptable concurrent data paths with well-tuned DSA configurations. Experimental results show that, compared to three representative tiered memory works: MEMTIS, TPP and NOMAD, DSA-2LM can achieve 20%, 30% and 16% performance improvement under real-world applications.
items.abstract_zh: 分层内存对于管理异构内存设备（例如持久内存或 CXL 内存）至关重要。现有的工作在最佳数据放置和昂贵的数据移动之间做出了艰难的权衡。随着英特尔数据流加速器 (DSA)（一种无需 CPU 的硬件，可在内存区域之间移动数据）的出现，数据移动速度比单个 CPU 内核快 4 倍。然而，Linux 内核中精细的内存移动粒度削弱了潜在的性能改进。为此，我们开发了DSA-2LM，这是一种新的分层内存系统，可自适应地将DSA集成到页面迁移中。所提出的框架将快速内存迁移工作流程和适应性强的并发数据路径与经过良好调整的 DSA 配置集成在一起。实验结果表明，与三种代表性的分层内存工作：MEMTIS、TPP和NOMAD相比，DSA-2LM在实际应用中可以实现20%、30%和16%的性能提升。

items.title: Fast Distributed Transactions for RDMA-based Disaggregated Memory.
items.abstract: Memory disaggregation has emerged as a promising datacenter architecture since it improves memory utilization and scalability. However, it is usually costly to process distributed transactions in disaggregated memory systems due to relatively high latency of remote memory accesses. In this paper, we present HDTX, a high-performance distributed transaction system for RDMA-based disaggregated memory. We advocate three novel designs. First, we propose a fast commit protocol (FCP) to minimize network round trips by coalescing different phases of distributed transaction processing. Second, we propose an RDMA-enabled offloading mechanism to reduce data transfers across computing and memory nodes by carefully orchestrating different RDMA primitives. Third, we propose decentralized priority-based locking to schedule mission-critical transactions, and thus further reduce the latency of distributed transactions. Experimental results show that HDTX reduces the latency of distributed transactions by up to 88.3% and 72.1%, and improves the throughput by up to 2.08× and 84.7%, compared with RDMA-based distributed transaction systems–FaRM and FORD, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 内存分解已成为一种有前途的数据中心架构，因为它提高了内存利用率和可扩展性。然而，由于远程内存访问的延迟相对较高，在分散的内存系统中处理分布式事务通常成本高昂。在本文中，我们提出了 HDTX，一种用于基于 RDMA 的分解内存的高性能分布式事务系统。我们提倡三种新颖的设计。首先，我们提出了一种快速提交协议（FCP），通过合并分布式事务处理的不同阶段来最小化网络往返次数。其次，我们提出了一种支持 RDMA 的卸载机制，通过仔细编排不同的 RDMA 原语来减少跨计算和内存节点的数据传输。第三，我们提出基于优先级的去中心化锁定来调度关键任务事务，从而进一步减少分布式事务的延迟。实验结果表明，与基于 RDMA 的分布式事务系统 FaRM 和 FORD 相比，HDTX 分别将分布式事务的延迟降低了 88.3% 和 72.1%，吞吐量提高了 2.08 倍和 84.7%。

items.title: MemoryTrap: Booby Trapping Memory to Counter Memory Disclosure Attacks with Hardware Support.
items.abstract: Code-reuse attacks harvest reusable code gadgets from the vulnerable program's executable memory, posing a severe threat to the widely deployed executable-space protection. With the advent of address space layout randomization, a more complicated tactic of code-reuse attacks, known as just-in-time return-oriented programming (JIT-ROP), has emerged. JIT-ROP relies on repeated memory disclosure to search for available code gadgets in real-time. In response, a series of techniques have surfaced to impede memory disclosure or to prevent disclosed code from subsequently being executed. The most representative countermeasures involve enforcing a stricter memory permission policy, such as execute-only memory or destructive code reads. However, existing methods are either vulnerable to emerging code inference attacks or disallow a mixture of code and data, which is a fundamental property of the von Neumann architecture. In this paper, we present MemoryTrap , a hardware-assisted technique to counter direct memory disclosure attacks while simultaneously allowing the mixture of code and data. MemoryTrap sprinkles unreadable "booby traps" in the program at compile time. Once JIT-ROP attackers land in a booby trap area during memory disclosure at runtime, MemoryTrap can immediately detect and stop the ongoing attack. We take advantage of a hardware feature from Intel, Memory Protection Keys, to offer an efficient memory permission control mechanism for booby traps. MemoryTrap supports the security hardening of applications, shared libraries, and dynamically generated JIT code. Our security evaluation demonstrates that MemoryTrap can reliably thwart the threat of disclosing executable memory in real JIT-ROP attacks and synthetic code inference attacks. Performance experiments with both microbenchmarks and macrobenchmarks show that MemoryTrap only introduces negligible runtime overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 代码重用攻击从易受攻击的程序的可执行内存中获取可重用的代码小工具，对广泛部署的可执行空间保护构成严重威胁。随着地址空间布局随机化的出现，出现了一种更复杂的代码重用攻击策略，称为即时返回导向编程（JIT-ROP）。 JIT-ROP 依靠重复的内存泄露来实时搜索可用的代码小工具。作为响应，一系列技术已经浮出水面，以阻止内存泄露或阻止所公开的代码随后被执行。最具代表性的对策包括强制执行更严格的内存权限策略，例如只执行内存或破坏性代码读取。然而，现有的方法要么容易受到新出现的代码推理攻击，要么不允许代码和数据的混合，这是冯·诺依曼架构的基本属性。在本文中，我们提出了 MemoryTrap，这是一种硬件辅助技术，可以对抗直接内存泄露攻击，同时允许代码和数据的混合。 MemoryTrap 在编译时在程序中撒下了不可读的“陷阱”。一旦 JIT-ROP 攻击者在运行时内存泄露期间落入陷阱区域，MemoryTrap 可以立即检测并阻止正在进行的攻击。我们利用英特尔的硬件功能“内存保护密钥”，为诱杀装置提供高效的内存权限控制机制。 MemoryTrap 支持应用程序、共享库和动态生成的 JIT 代码的安全强化。我们的安全评估表明，MemoryTrap 可以可靠地阻止真实 JIT-ROP 攻击和合成代码推理攻击中泄露可执行内存的威胁。微基准和宏基准的性能实验表明，MemoryTrap 只引入了可以忽略不计的运行时开销。

items.title: LITESHIELD: Secure Containers via Lightweight, Composable Userspace μKernel Services.
items.abstract: This paper introduces LITESHIELD, a new userspace isolation architecture for secure containers that reexamines the boundary between user applications and system services. LITESHIELD decouples traditional guest kernel functionality into modular userspace microkernel (µkernel) services that interact with guest applications via low-latency, shared-memory-based inter-process communication (IPC). By serving most Linux syscalls in userspace, LITESHIELD enforces a significantly reduced user-to-host interface, with just 22 syscalls, achieving strong isolation comparable to virtual machines (VMs) while avoiding the complexity of hypervisors and hardware virtualization. LITESHIELD further provides a POSIX-compatible runtime with fine-grained syscall interception to support legacy applications and enables composable µkernel services that can integrate specialized userspace components (e.g., networking and filesystems). Our implementation demonstrates that LITESHIELD delivers strong isolation with performance comparable to traditional containers.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 LITESHIELD，这是一种用于安全容器的新用户空间隔离架构，它重新审视了用户应用程序和系统服务之间的边界。 LITESHIELD 将传统来宾内核功能解耦为模块化用户空间微内核 (μkernel) 服务，这些服务通过低延迟、基于共享内存的进程间通信 (IPC) 与来宾应用程序进行交互。通过在用户空间中为大多数 Linux 系统调用提供服务，LITESHIELD 显着减少了用户到主机的接口，仅使用 22 个系统调用，实现了与虚拟机 (VM) 相当的强大隔离，同时避免了虚拟机管理程序和硬件虚拟化的复杂性。 LITESHIELD 进一步提供了具有细粒度系统调用拦截的 POSIX 兼容运行时，以支持遗留应用程序，并支持可集成专用用户空间组件（例如网络和文件系统）的可组合 µkernel 服务。我们的实施表明，LITESHIELD 提供了强大的隔离能力，其性能可与传统容器相媲美。

items.title: AnchorNet: Bridging Live and Collaborative Streaming with a Unified Architecture.
items.abstract: Collaborative streaming has emerged as a popular mode in modern live streaming applications. In the meanwhile of improving interactivity between broadcasters and viewers, it requires the live streaming architecture to smoothly switch between two streaming modes (e.g., traditional live streaming with a single broadcaster and collaborative streaming with at least two collaborative broadcasters). In this paper, we present AnchorNet, the new live streaming architecture for one of the most popular streaming applications. The core of AnchorNet is a unified stream path from the broadcaster to the viewer, enabling the host broadcaster of a live channel to switch between streaming modes within a continuous application session. It also proposes audio stream splicing techniques to further minimize unpleasant audio glitches during streaming mode switching. Practical deployment shows that AnchorNet can significantly reduce rebuffering during mode switching by over 60%, and increase user engagement by up to 3.83%.
items.abstract_zh: 协作流媒体已成为现代直播应用程序中的流行模式。在提高主播和观众之间的交互性的同时，需要直播架构能够在两种直播模式之间平滑切换（例如，单个主播的传统直播和至少两个协作主播的协作直播）。在本文中，我们介绍了 AnchorNet，这是一种适用于最流行的流媒体应用程序的新型实时流媒体架构。 AnchorNet 的核心是从广播公司到观众的统一流路径，使直播频道的主播能够在连续的应用程序会话中在流模式之间切换。它还提出了音频流拼接技术，以进一步减少流模式切换期间令人不快的音频故障。实际部署表明，AnchorNet 可以显着减少模式切换过程中的重新缓冲超过 60%，并将用户参与度提高高达 3.83%。

items.title: SolFS: An Operation-Log Versioning File System for Hash-free Efficient Mobile Cloud Backup.
items.abstract: Mobile cloud backup applications are widely used to safeguard user data. This paper found that current cloud backup is inefficient on resource-limited mobile devices because it consumes excessive CPU resources for delta synchronization that requires intensive hash computation to identify the modified ranges of file data. To address this issue, this paper presents SolFS, an operation log versioning file system to optimize mobile cloud backup efficiency. The core idea is that if the cloud backup application knows the modified offset and length of each write since the last backup, it will be able to identify the new modified data and upload them only, avoiding data hashing throughout the entire file. SolFS proposes a series of designs to achieve this design goal. First, SolFS introduces per-file mergeable operation logging that allows each file to manage its write operation logs (i.e., offset and length) in an extent tree and merge operation logs with contiguous or overlapping modified ranges of file data. Then, SolFS proposes the operation log persistence and versioning mechanism that allows different cloud backup applications to manage their own file versions without interfering with each other. In addition, SolFS incorporates techniques such as compact log and dynamic granularity, to optimize the memory and storage overhead to the system. Finally, SolFS achieves hash-free file difference identification with minimum additional overhead and extends the ability of cloud backup applications. The experimental results show that SolFS can significantly reduce the computational overhead of both APP-side or server-side over 90% on average and the total cloud synchronization time by over 88.8% when files are updated.
items.abstract_zh: 移动云备份应用广泛用于保护用户数据。本文发现，当前的云备份在资源有限的移动设备上效率较低，因为它会消耗过多的 CPU 资源来进行增量同步，而增量同步需要大量的哈希计算来识别文件数据的修改范围。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了SolFS，一种操作日志版本控制文件系统，用于优化移动云备份效率。其核心思想是，如果云备份应用程序知道自上次备份以来每次写入的修改偏移量和长度，它将能够识别新修改的数据并仅上传它们，从而避免整个文件中的数据散列。 SolFS提出了一系列设计来实现这一设计目标。首先，SolFS 引入了每个文件的可合并操作日志记录，允许每个文件在范围树中管理其写入操作日志（即偏移量和长度），并将操作日志与连续或重叠的文件数据修改范围合并。然后，SolFS提出了操作日志持久化和版本控制机制，允许不同的云备份应用程序管理自己的文件版本，而不会互相干扰。此外，SolFS 还结合了紧凑日志和动态粒度等技术，以优化系统的内存和存储开销。最后，SolFS以最小的额外开销实现了无哈希文件差异识别，并扩展了云备份应用的能力。实验结果表明，SolFS在文件更新时可以显着降低APP端或服务器端的计算开销，平均降低90%以上，总云同步时间降低88.8%以上。

items.title: XRT: An Accelerator-Aware Runtime for Accelerated Chip Multiprocessors.
items.abstract: Datacenter applications spend a considerable portion of compute resources executing common functions. This has led to the deployment of accelerators capable of executing these functions with higher performance and energy efficiency. At the same time, datacenter applications require microsecond-scale response times and low tail latency. To meet these strict requirements, recent Chip Multi-Processors (CMPs) incorporate several on-chip accelerators. This enables fast communication between the general-purpose cores, direct accelerator access to the on-chip memory subsystem, and scalable sharing of accelerator resources across applications running on many general-purpose cores. Despite hardware support for on-chip accelerators, a lack of support at the runtime level prevents their efficient use at scale. Our key insight in this work is that current runtimes are unsuitable for applications that make heavy use of on-chip accelerators, yielding suboptimal throughput–sometimes even worse than a system without accelerators. To address this problem, we develop XRT, a runtime for accelerated CMPs designed to scale to many-core, many-accelerator CPUs. Across a set of representative services, XRT achieves up to 3.2× higher throughput-under-SLO compared to an unoptimized runtime and never experiences slowdowns compared to a system that executes all request processing on general-purpose cores.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心应用程序花费相当一部分计算资源来执行常见功能。这导致了能够以更高的性能和能源效率执行这些功能的加速器的部署。同时，数据中心应用程序需要微秒级响应时间和低尾部延迟。为了满足这些严格的要求，最新的片上多处理器 (CMP) 集成了多个片上加速器。这样可以实现通用内核之间的快速通信、对片上内存子系统的直接加速器访问以及在许多通用内核上运行的应用程序之间可扩展地共享加速器资源。尽管硬件支持片上加速器，但缺乏运行时级别的支持阻碍了它们的大规模有效使用。我们在这项工作中的主要见解是，当前的运行时不适合大量使用片上加速器的应用程序，从而产生次优的吞吐量——有时甚至比没有加速器的系统更糟糕。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 XRT，这是一种加速 CMP 的运行时，旨在扩展到多核、多加速器 CPU。在一组代表性服务中，与未优化的运行时相比，XRT 在 SLO 下的吞吐量提高了 3.2 倍，并且与在通用内核上执行所有请求处理的系统相比，从未出现过速度下降的情况。

items.title: ASTERINAS: A Linux ABI-Compatible, Rust-Based Framekernel OS with a Small and Sound TCB.
items.abstract: How can one build a feature-rich , general-purpose , Rust-based operating system (OS) with a minimal and sound Trusted Computing Base (TCB) for memory safety ? Existing Rust-based OSes fall short due to their improper use of unsafe Rust in kernel development. To address this challenge, we propose a novel OS architecture called framekernel that realizes Rust's full potential to achieve intra-kernel privilege separation , ensuring TCB minimality and soundness. We present OSTD, a streamlined framework for safe Rust OS development, and ASTERINAS, a Linux ABI-compatible framekernel OS implemented entirely in safe Rust using OSTD. Supporting over 210 Linux system calls, ASTERINAS delivers performance on par with Linux, while maintaining a minimized, memory-safety TCB of only about 14.0% of the codebase. These results underscore the practicality and benefits of the framekernel architecture in building safe and efficient OSes.
items.abstract_zh: 如何构建一个功能丰富、通用、基于 Rust 的操作系统 (OS)，并具有最小且健全的可信计算基础 (TCB) 以确保内存安全？现有的基于 Rust 的操作系统由于在内核开发中不当使用不安全的 Rust 而存在缺陷。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种称为framekernel的新颖操作系统架构，它充分发挥Rust实现内核内权限分离的潜力，确保TCB的最小性和健全性。我们展示了 OSTD，一个用于安全 Rust 操作系统开发的简化框架，以及 ASTERINAS，一个使用 OSTD 完全在安全 Rust 中实现的 Linux ABI 兼容框架内核操作系统。 ASTERINAS 支持超过 210 个 Linux 系统调用，提供与 Linux 相当的性能，同时保持最小化的内存安全 TCB，仅占代码库的 14.0% 左右。这些结果强调了框架内核架构在构建安全高效操作系统方面的实用性和优势。

items.title: Barre: Empowering Simplified and Versatile Programmable Congestion Control in High-Speed AI Clusters.
items.abstract: Network interface cards (NICs) and switches have entered the 400 Gbps era. RoCEv2 networks face significant challenges in congestion management, particularly under high-throughput workloads. While advanced congestion control algorithms have been proposed, their deployment in large-scale data centers remains hindered by complex parameter tuning and dependency on sophisticated hardware features. In this paper, we present Barre, a simple yet highly effective congestion control scheme designed for modern AI/HPC clusters operating at 400 Gbps. By leveraging commodity hardware and standard network functionalities, Barre achieves near-optimal performance in fairness, congestion responsiveness, and scalability with minimal overhead. Deployed in our 400 Gbps RoCE cluster for over a year and supporting up to 10,000 GPUs, Barre improves AI training task throughput by an average of 9.6%. Furthermore, we demonstrate that Barre’s core principles can be seamlessly applied to enhance DCQCN, a widely deployed congestion control algorithm, underscoring its practicality and versatility.
items.abstract_zh: 网络接口卡 (NIC) 和交换机已进入 400 Gbps 时代。 RoCEv2 网络在拥塞管理方面面临重大挑战，特别是在高吞吐量工作负载下。尽管已经提出了先进的拥塞控制算法，但它们在大型数据中心的部署仍然受到复杂的参数调整和对复杂硬件功能的依赖的阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 Barre，这是一种简单但高效的拥塞控制方案，专为以 400 Gbps 运行的现代 AI/HPC 集群而设计。通过利用商用硬件和标准网络功能，Barre 以最小的开销在公平性、拥塞响应性和可扩展性方面实现了近乎最佳的性能。 Barre 在我们的 400 Gbps RoCE 集群中部署了一年多，支持多达 10,000 个 GPU，将 AI 训练任务吞吐量平均提高了 9.6%。此外，我们证明了 Barre 的核心原理可以无缝地应用于增强 DCQCN（一种广泛部署的拥塞控制算法），强调了其实用性和多功能性。

items.title: Burst Computing: Quick, Sudden, Massively Parallel Processing on Serverless Resources.
items.abstract: We present burst computing, a novel serverless solution tailored for burst-parallel jobs. Unlike Function-as-a-Service (FaaS), burst computing establishes job-level isolation using a novel group invocation primitive to launch large groups of workers with guaranteed simultaneity. Resource allocation is optimized by packing workers into fewer containers, which accelerates their initialization and enables locality. Locality significantly reduces remote communication compared to FaaS and, combined with simultaneity, it allows workers to communicate synchronously with message passing and group collectives. Consequently, applications unfeasible in FaaS are now possible. We implement burst computing atop OpenWhisk and provide a communication middleware that seamlessly leverages locality with zero-copy messaging. Evaluation shows reduced job invocation and communication latency for a 2× speed-up in TeraSort and a 98.5% reduction in remote communication in PageRank (13× speed-up) compared to standard FaaS.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出突发计算，这是一种专为突发并行作业量身定制的新型无服务器解决方案。与功能即服务 (FaaS) 不同，突发计算使用新颖的组调用原语建立作业级隔离，以保证同时性启动大型工作组。通过将工作线程打包到更少的容器中来优化资源分配，从而加速其初始化并实现局部性。与 FaaS 相比，局部性显着减少了远程通信，并且与同时性相结合，它允许工作人员与消息传递和群组集体进行同步通信。因此，FaaS 中不可行的应用现在成为可能。我们在 OpenWhisk 之上实现突发计算，并提供一个通信中间件，该中间件可以通过零复制消息传递无缝地利用局部性。评估显示，与标准 FaaS 相比，TeraSort 中的作业调用和通信延迟减少了 2 倍，PageRank 中的远程通信减少了 98.5%（加速了 13 倍）。

items.title: HotRAP: Hot Record Retention and Promotion for LSM-trees with Tiered Storage.
items.abstract: Tiered storage architectures are promising to improve cost efficiency by combining small and fast storage with slower but cheaper mediums. However, existing designs of Log-Structured Merge-trees (LSM-trees) on tiered storage cannot simultaneously support efficient read and write accesses. Keeping the upper and lower LSM-tree levels in the fast and slow storage respectively (i.e., tiering) allows efficient writes to the fast disks, but read-hot data may be stuck in the slow disks. Putting all the levels in the slow storage and using the fast disks as a cache (i.e., caching) can handle frequently read data efficiently, but LSM-tree compactions now need to happen in the slow disks. We present HotRAP, a key-value store based on RocksDB that follows the tiering approach above, but enhances it to timely promote hot records individually from slow to fast storage and keep them in fast storage while they are hot. HotRAP uses an on-disk data structure (a specially-made LSM-tree) to track the hotness of keys in a fine-grained manner, and leverages two pathways to ensure that hot records reach fast storage with short delays. Our experiments show that HotRAP outperforms state-of-the-art LSM-trees on tiered storage by up to 1.6× compared to the second best under read-write-balanced YCSB workloads with common access skew patterns, and up to 1.5× under Twitter production workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 分层存储架构有望通过将小型快速存储与速度较慢但更便宜的介质相结合来提高成本效率。然而，分层存储上的日志结构合并树（LSM树）的现有设计无法同时支持高效的读取和写入访问。将较高和较低的LSM树级别分别保留在快速和慢速存储中（即分层）可以有效地写入快速磁盘，但读取热数据可能会卡在慢速磁盘中。将所有级别放在慢速存储中并使用快速磁盘作为缓存（即缓存）可以有效地处理频繁读取的数据，但现在需要在慢速磁盘中进行LSM树压缩。我们提出了 HotRAP，一个基于 RocksDB 的键值存储，它遵循上述分层方法，但对其进行了增强，可以及时将热记录从慢速存储单独提升到快速存储，并在热时将它们保留在快速存储中。 HotRAP使用磁盘上的数据结构（特制的LSM树）来细粒度地跟踪键的热度，并利用两条路径来确保热记录以较短的延迟快速到达存储。我们的实验表明，HotRAP 在分层存储上的性能比最先进的 LSM 树高出 1.6 倍，而在具有常见访问偏差模式的读写平衡 YCSB 工作负载下的第二佳性能则高出 1.6 倍，在 Twitter 生产工作负载下高出 1.5 倍。

items.title: FiDe: Reliable and Fast Crash Failure Detection to Boost Datacenter Coordination.
items.abstract: Failure detection is one of the most fundamental primitives on which distributed fault tolerant services and applications rely to achieve liveness. Typical failure detectors resort to using timeouts that have to take into account the unpredictability in interaction times among remote processes, caused by resource contention in the network and in endhost processors. While modern (gray) failure detectors have improved in detecting a wide range of failures, the problem of prohibitively large and unreliable timeouts for crash failures still persists, hampering performance of both the failure detector themselves and modern μs-scale services sitting on top. We propose a novel [f]ully rel[i]able failure- [de]tector (FiDe) that can report the crash of a remote process in a datacenter within less than 30 μs ( 7.2× faster than the current state of the art) with extremely high reliability , thanks to a ground-up design which provides stable end-to-end process interactions. By reliably lowering worst-case crash detection time, FiDe enables a class of algorithms that can be used to boost coordination services even in the absence of failures. We devise two novel, FiDe-based, highly efficient consensus protocols and integrate them into a key-value store and a synchronization service, improving throughput by up to 2.23× and reducing latency down to 0.46×.
items.abstract_zh: 故障检测是分布式容错服务和应用程序赖以实现活跃性的最基本原语之一。典型的故障检测器采用超时，必须考虑远程进程之间交互时间的不可预测性，这是由网络和终端主机处理器中的资源争用引起的。虽然现代（灰色）故障检测器在检测各种故障方面有所改进，但崩溃故障超时过大且不可靠的问题仍然存在，从而阻碍了故障检测器本身和位于顶部的现代μs级服务的性能。我们提出了一种新颖的完全可靠的故障检测器 (FiDe)，它可以在不到 30 μs 的时间内报告数据中心中远程进程的崩溃（比当前技术水平快 7.2 倍），并且具有极高的可靠性，这要归功于提供稳定的端到端进程交互的全新设计。通过可靠地降低最坏情况的碰撞检测时间，FiDe 支持一类算法，即使在没有故障的情况下也可用于增强协调服务。我们设计了两种新颖的、基于 FiDe 的高效共识协议，并将它们集成到键值存储和同步服务中，将吞吐量提高高达 2.23 倍，并将延迟降低至 0.46 倍。

items.title: Bluetooth Low Energy Security Testing with Combinatorial Methods.
items.abstract: Wireless protocols such as Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) play a vital role in ubiquitous computing and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Numerous vulnerabilities in a variety of devices and components of the BLE stack have been uncovered in recent years, potentially affecting millions of customers. Being notoriously difficult to test due to the level of abstraction commonly enforced by the Host Controller Interface (HCI), a recent work successfully implements a fuzzing framework utilizing a custom firmware for a BLE device. However, fuzzing is inherently probabilistic, which may lead to faults remaining undiscovered. In this work, we enhance the aforementioned method with a Combinatorial Security Testing (CST) approach that provides a guaranteed degree of input space coverage. Through an evaluation targeting 10 BLE devices and a variety of firmware versions, we identify a total of 19 distinct issues, replicating findings of the previous work and uncovering additional faults. We additionally provide a performance overview of our tool and the original fuzzer, comparing their execution time and fault detection capabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 低功耗蓝牙 (BLE) 等无线协议在普适计算和物联网 (IoT) 设备中发挥着至关重要的作用。近年来，BLE 堆栈的各种设备和组件中发现了许多漏洞，可能会影响数百万客户。由于主机控制器接口 (HCI) 通常强制执行的抽象级别，测试非常困难，最近的一项工作利用 BLE 设备的自定义固件成功实现了模糊测试框架。然而，模糊测试本质上是概率性的，这可能会导致错误未被发现。在这项工作中，我们使用组合安全测试（CST）方法增强了上述方法，该方法提供了有保证的输入空间覆盖程度。通过针对 10 个 BLE 设备和各种固件版本的评估，我们总共发现了 19 个不同的问题，复制了之前工作的发现并发现了其他故障。我们还提供了我们的工具和原始模糊器的性能概述，比较了它们的执行时间和故障检测能力。

items.title: Primus: Unified Training System for Large-Scale Deep Learning Recommendation Models.
items.abstract: The scale of deep learning recommendation models (DLRM) continues to grow, demanding increasingly vast computing and storage resources. In production environments, improving training efficiency and effectiveness has become the primary goal to meet the needs of numerous model training jobs under resource limitations. We introduce Primus, a unified training system that unifies the training resources, data, and paradigms to support high-performance DLRM training at ByteDance. Specifically, ① Primus provides a unified abstraction of resources and interoperates with multiple scheduling systems, achieving a consistent training experience with horizontal and vertical dynamic scaling strategies across resource pools. ② Primus offers a unified three-tier data definition and employs a data task graph generation approach to support data orchestration of multi-source training samples composed of batch and stream data. ③ Primus devises a new hybrid training paradigm for DLRMs that ensures high model timeliness by controlling parameter updates and applying fine-grained prioritization of mixed batch and stream data. Primus has demonstrated its efficiency and effectiveness in handling large-scale, enterprise-grade DLRM training over five years of deployment at ByteDance. Evaluations show Primus’s optimizations of resources, data, and paradigms. Firstly, dynamic scaling reduces training cost by 17.1% at the cluster level and increases CPU utilization from 50% to 80% per job. Secondly, data orchestration accelerates task generation by 23× and achieves higher training throughput. Lastly, after applying the hybrid training paradigm with 4 different DLRMs, advertising revenue increases by 0.4%-2.4%.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）的规模持续增长，需要越来越庞大的计算和存储资源。在生产环境中，提高训练效率和效果成为满足资源有限下众多模型训练作业需求的首要目标。我们推出 Primus，这是一个统一的训练系统，它统一了训练资源、数据和范式，以支持字节跳动的高性能 DLRM 训练。具体来说，①Primus提供了资源的统一抽象，并与多种调度系统互操作，通过跨资源池的横向和纵向动态扩展策略实现一致的训练体验。 ② Primus 提供统一的三层数据定义，并采用数据任务图生成方式，支持批量和流数据组成的多源训练样本的数据编排。 ③ Primus 为 DLRM 设计了一种新的混合训练范例，通过控制参数更新和应用混合批和流数据的细粒度优先级来确保模型的高及时性。 Primus 在字节跳动五年的部署中证明了其处理大规模企业级 DLRM 训练的效率和有效性。评估显示了 Primus 对资源、数据和范式的优化。首先，动态扩展将集群级别的训练成本降低了 17.1%，并将每个作业的 CPU 利用率从 50% 提高到 80%。其次，数据编排将任务生成速度提高了 23 倍，并实现了更高的训练吞吐量。最后，应用 4 种不同 DLRM 的混合训练范例后，广告收入增加了 0.4%-2.4%。

items.title: Converos: Practical Model Checking for Verifying Rust OS Kernel Concurrency.
items.abstract: ASTERINAS is an open-source, general-purpose operating system written in Rust, compatible with the Linux ABI, and designed with a focus on reliability and security. We developed a practical model-checking methodology, CONVEROS, to verify the correctness of ASTERINAS concurrency modules such as synchronization primitives and critical thread-safety components. CONVEROS leverages the rigor of formal specifications and introduces a multi-layered, multi-grained specification approach to make writing scalable specifications practical, demonstrated in our case by writing PlusCal specifications for Rust code. It also makes conformance checking incremental and more automated to detect specification-code discrepancies. While many formal methods are challenging to apply due to complexity and the expertise required, CONVEROS makes model checking cost-effective, accessible, and adaptable to evolving specifications and code. We applied CONVEROS to 12 critical concurrency modules, uncovering 20 bugs that led to issues such as data races, deadlocks, livelocks, and kernel panics. With a specification-to-code ratio ranging from 0.3 to 2.3 and a verification effort of only four person-months, our results demonstrate the practicality and effectiveness of CONVEROS.
items.abstract_zh: ASTERINAS 是一款用 Rust 编写的开源通用操作系统，与 Linux ABI 兼容，设计时注重可靠性和安全性。我们开发了一种实用的模型检查方法 CONVEROS，以验证 ASTERINAS 并发模块（例如同步原语和关键线程安全组件）的正确性。 CONVEROS 利用正式规范的严格性，并引入了多层、多粒度的规范方法，使编写可扩展的规范变得实用，这在我们的案例中通过为 Rust 代码编写 PlusCal 规范进行了演示。它还使一致性检查变得增量且更加自动化，以检测规范代码差异。虽然许多正式方法由于复杂性和所需的专业知识而难以应用，但 CONVEROS 使模型检查具有成本效益、易于访问并且能够适应不断发展的规范和代码。我们将 CONVEROS 应用于 12 个关键并发模块，发现了 20 个导致数据争用、死锁、活锁和内核恐慌等问题的错误。规范与代码的比率范围为 0.3 到 2.3，验证工作仅需四个人月，我们的结果证明了 CONVEROS 的实用性和有效性。

items.title: CLONE: Customizing LLMs for Efficient Latency-Aware Inference at the Edge.
items.abstract: Deploying large language models (LLMs) on edge devices is crucial for delivering fast responses and ensuring data privacy. However, the limited storage, weight, and power of edge devices make it difficult to deploy LLM-powered applications. These devices must balance latency requirements with energy consumption and model accuracy. In this paper, we first quantify the challenges of deploying LLMs on off-the-shelf edge devices and then we present CLONE, an in-depth algorithm-hardware co-design at both the model- and system-level that intelligently integrates real-time, energy optimization while maintaining robust generality. In order to maximize the synergistic benefits of these algorithms in always-on and intermediate edge computing settings, we specialize in a 28nm scalable hardware accelerator system. We implement and extensively evaluate CLONE on two off-the-shelf edge platforms. Experiments show that CLONE effectively accelerates the inference process up to 11.92×, and saves energy up to 7.36×, while maintaining high-generation.
items.abstract_zh: 在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于提供快速响应和确保数据隐私至关重要。然而，边缘设备的存储、重量和功率有限，使得部署 LLM 支持的应用程序变得困难。这些设备必须平衡延迟要求与能耗和模型精度。在本文中，我们首先量化了在现成的边缘设备上部署 LLM 的挑战，然后提出了 CLONE，这是一种在模型和系统级别上进行深入的算法-硬件协同设计，可以智能地集成实时能量优化，同时保持强大的通用性。为了在始终在线和中间边缘计算设置中最大限度地发挥这些算法的协同优势，我们专门开发了 28nm 可扩展硬件加速器系统。我们在两个现成的边缘平台上实施并广泛评估 CLONE。实验表明，CLONE在保持高生成率的同时，有效地将推理过程加速高达11.92倍，并节省能源高达7.36倍。

items.title: NetKeeper: Enhancing Network Resilience with Autonomous Network Configuration Update on Traffic Patterns and Anomalies.
items.abstract: Incremental policies and anomaly logs require operators to update network configuration during network operations. However, existing configuration methods lack the capability for intent understanding, traffic analysis optimization, and network dynamic adaptability, complicating overall configuration management. We propose NetKeeper , an autonomous network configuration update framework. NetKeeper updates network configurations based on multimodal network intent comprising natural language input and anomaly logs, enabling adaptability to network dynamics and enhancing resilience through analyzing traffic patterns and anomalies. We implement northbound and southbound interfaces to translate network intents from operators and network management platforms respectively, bridging the gap between network intents and network behaviors. A multi-agent reinforcement learning model is designed for network configuration updates based on traffic patterns in dynamic networks. This model divides agents based on configuration parameter types, achieving both network resilience optimization and forwarding policy satisfaction. Experiments in dynamic network show that NetKeeper updates network configurations with 99.6% average policy consistency, improves network performance by 5.3%, and reduces traffic shift by 8.7% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 增量策略和异常日志要求运营商在网络运营过程中更新网络配置。然而，现有的配置方法缺乏意图理解、流量分析优化和网络动态适应性的能力，导致整体配置管理变得复杂。我们提出 NetKeeper，一个自主网络配置更新框架。 NetKeeper 根据包括自然语言输入和异常日志在内的多模式网络意图更新网络配置，从而能够适应网络动态并通过分析流量模式和异常来增强弹性。我们实现北向和南向接口来分别翻译来自运营商和网络管理平台的网络意图，弥合网络意图和网络行为之间的差距。多智能体强化学习模型旨在根据动态网络中的流量模式进行网络配置更新。该模型根据配置参数类型划分代理，实现网络弹性优化和转发策略满足。动态网络实验表明，NetKeeper更新网络配置的策略一致性平均达到99.6%，网络性能提升5.3%，流量平均减少8.7%。

items.title: Minos : A Lightweight and Dynamic Defense against Traffic Analysis in Programmable Data Planes.
items.abstract: Encrypted traffic analysis techniques extract valuable information from encrypted traffic and pose significant threats to user privacy. However, existing defense mechanisms against traffic analysis either incur significant bandwidth overhead and lack scalability, or fail to provide sufficient defense against evolving attacks. The emerging programmable switches provide data plane programmability with line rate packet processing to support advanced defense mechanisms. In this work, we present Minos, a lightweight and scalable programmable switch-based defense mechanism while providing both identity anonymity and traffic anonymity. Minos comprises three key modules: the Proxy Module, the Traffic Morphing Module, and the Schedule Module. In the Proxy Module, we design encryption round compression to take advantage of the match-action pipeline of programmable switches and realize line rate packet header encryption. The Schedule Module incorporates a lightweight dynamic flow scheduling method to interleave packets from different flows, so as to simulate dummy packets without causing bandwidth and delay overhead on the data plane. The Traffic Morphing Module further obfuscates the flows by dummy packet insertion and packet padding. Specifically, we devise a lightweight dummy packet scheduling method using priority dummy queues, minimizing bandwidth and delay overhead within the switch pipeline. We implement our defense on Tofino1 switches and adapt our method to defend Website Fingerprinting and IoT Fingerprinting. The results show that Minos can reduce the accuracy of previous attacks to less than 20% with only one-tenth of the overhead of existing defenses.
items.abstract_zh: 加密流量分析技术从加密流量中提取有价值的信息，并对用户隐私构成重大威胁。然而，针对流量分析的现有防御机制要么会产生大量带宽开销并且缺乏可扩展性，要么无法针对不断发展的攻击提供足够的防御。新兴的可编程交换机提供数据平面可编程性和线速数据包处理，以支持先进的防御机制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Minos，一种轻量级、可扩展的、基于可编程交换机的防御机制，同时提供身份匿名和流量匿名。 Minos 包含三个关键模块：代理模块、流量变形模块和调度模块。在代理模块中，我们设计了加密轮压缩，以利用可编程交换机的匹配动作管道，实现线速数据包头加密。调度模块采用轻量级动态流调度方法来交织来自不同流的数据包，从而模拟虚拟数据包，而不会在数据平面上造成带宽和延迟开销。流量变形模块通过虚拟数据包插入和数据包填充进一步混淆流量。具体来说，我们使用优先级虚拟队列设计了一种轻量级虚拟数据包调度方法，最大限度地减少了交换机管道内的带宽和延迟开销。我们在 Tofino1 交换机上实施防御，并调整我们的方法来防御网站指纹和物联网指纹。结果表明，Minos 可以将以往攻击的准确率降低到 20% 以下，而开销仅为现有防御的十分之一。

items.title: Emulating Space Computing Networks with RHONE.
items.abstract: The rapid advancement in satellite technology with the adoption of commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) devices and satellite constellation networking has given rise to Space Computing Networks (SCNs). While SCN research is typically conducted on experimental platforms due to high operational costs, the unique challenges of SCNs — such as the harsh space environment (e.g., power and thermal constraints) and dynamic constellation networks — require special consideration. Existing platforms cannot fully replicate the SCN operating environment with high scalability. This paper introduces RHONE, an emulator that bridges these gaps by achieving both satellite- and constellation-level fidelity (the accurate replication of satellite and constellation states, including power, thermal, and network conditions, as well as application performance characteristics) while ensuring usability. RHONE adopts a two-phase emulation approach: i) an offline phase builds power, thermal, orbit, network, and computation models using real satellite telemetry data and hardware-in-the-loop chip mirroring, and ii) an online phase executes container-based emulation integrated with these models. Key components, the satellite COTS aligner and the satellite network aligner, dynamically align the containers with real satellite conditions. Evaluation shows RHONE’s scalability to 700 satellites on a single node, with power and computation model errors under 5% and thermal model errors within 1.3–2.5°C. Two case studies — satellite network energy drain attack and real-time earth observation application — demonstrate RHONE's capability to emulate satellite- and constellation-level dynamics.
items.abstract_zh: 随着商用现成 (COTS) 设备和卫星星座网络的采用，卫星技术迅速发展，催生了空间计算网络 (SCN)。虽然由于运营成本较高，SCN 研究通常在实验平台上进行，但 SCN 的独特挑战 - 例如恶劣的空间环境（例如功率和热限制）和动态星座网络 - 需要特殊考虑。现有平台无法完全复制高扩展性的SCN运行环境。本文介绍了 RHONE 模拟器，它通过实现卫星和星座级保真度（卫星和星座状态的准确复制，包括功率、热量和网络条件以及应用程序性能特征）同时确保可用性来弥补这些差距。 RHONE 采用两阶段仿真方法：i) 离线阶段使用真实的卫星遥测数据和硬件在环芯片镜像构建功率、热量、轨道、网络和计算模型，ii) 在线阶段执行与这些模型集成的基于容器的仿真。卫星 COTS 对准器和卫星网络对准器等关键组件可根据真实的卫星条件动态调整集装箱。评估显示，RHONE 可在单个节点上扩展至 700 颗卫星，功率和计算模型误差低于 5%，热模型误差在 1.3–2.5°C 以内。两个案例研究——卫星网络能量消耗攻击和实时地球观测应用——展示了 RHONE 模拟卫星和星座级动态的能力。

items.title: JENGA: Enhancing LLM Long-Context Fine-tuning with Contextual Token Sparsity.
items.abstract: The escalating demand for long-context applications has intensified the necessity of extending the LLM context windows. Despite recent fine-tuning approaches successfully expanding context lengths, their high memory footprints, especially for activations, present a critical practical limitation. Current parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods prioritize reducing parameter update overhead over addressing activation memory constraints. Similarly, existing sparsity mechanisms improve computational efficiency but overlook activation memory optimization due to the phenomenon of Shadowy Activation . In this paper, we propose JENGA, the first LLM fine-tuning system that explores and exploits a new token-level sparsity mechanism inherent in long-context scenarios, termed Contextual Token Sparsity . JENGA minimizes redundant token involvement by assessing the informativeness of token embeddings while preserving model accuracy. Specifically, JENGA introduces three key techniques: (1) Token Elimination, dynamically identifying and excluding redundant tokens across varying inputs and layers. (2) Pattern Prediction, utilizing well-trained predictors to approximate token sparsity patterns with minimal overhead. (3) Kernel Optimization, employing permutation-free and segment-based strategies to boost system performance. We implement JENGA as an end-to-end fine-tuning system compatible with various LLM architectures and other optimization techniques. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that JENGA reduces memory consumption by up to 1.93× and achieves up to 1.36× speedups, outperforming state-of-the-art fine-tuning systems.
items.abstract_zh: 对长上下文应用程序的需求不断增加，增强了扩展 LLM 上下文窗口的必要性。尽管最近的微调方法成功地扩展了上下文长度，但它们的高内存占用（尤其是对于激活而言）提出了关键的实际限制。当前的参数高效微调方法优先考虑减少参数更新开销而不是解决激活内存约束。同样，现有的稀疏机制提高了计算效率，但由于 Shadowy Activation 现象而忽略了激活内存优化。在本文中，我们提出了 JENGA，这是第一个 LLM 微调系统，它探索和利用了长上下文场景中固有的新令牌级稀疏机制，称为上下文令牌稀疏性。 JENGA 通过评估令牌嵌入的信息量，同时保持模型准确性，最大限度地减少冗余令牌的参与。具体来说，JENGA 引入了三个关键技术：（1）令牌消除，动态识别和排除不同输入和层中的冗余令牌。 (2) 模式预测，利用训练有素的预测器以最小的开销来近似令牌稀疏模式。 (3) 内核优化，采用无排列和基于段的策略来提高系统性能。我们将 JENGA 实现为与各种 LLM 架构和其他优化技术兼容的端到端微调系统。综合评估表明，JENGA 可将内存消耗降低高达 1.93 倍，并实现高达 1.36 倍的加速，优于最先进的微调系统。

items.title: GMI-DRL: Empowering Multi-GPU DRL with Adaptive-Grained Parallelism.
items.abstract: With the increasing popularity of robotics in industrial control and autonomous driving, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) raises the attention of various fields. However, DRL computation on the modern powerful multi-GPU platform is still inefficient due to its heterogeneous tasks and complicated inter-task interactions. To this end, we propose GMI-DRL, the first systematic design for scaling multi-GPU DRL via adaptive-grained parallelism. To facilitate such a new parallelism scheme, GMI-DRL introduces a new concept – GPU Multiplexing Instance (GMI), a unified resource-adjustable sub-GPU design for heterogeneous tasks in DRL scaling. Besides, GMI-DRL introduces an adaptive Coordinator to effectively manage workloads and resources for better system performance. GMI-DRL also incorporates a specialized Communicator with highly efficient inter-GMI communication support to meet diverse communication demands. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GMI-DRL outperforms state-of-the-art DRL accelerating solutions in training throughput (up to 2.34x) and GPU utilization (up to 40.8% improvement) on the DGX-A100 platform.
items.abstract_zh: 随着机器人技术在工业控制和自动驾驶领域的日益普及，深度强化学习（DRL）引起了各个领域的关注。然而，由于异构任务和复杂的任务间交互，现代强大的多 GPU 平台上的 DRL 计算仍然效率低下。为此，我们提出了 GMI-DRL，这是第一个通过自适应粒度并行扩展多 GPU DRL 的系统设计。为了促进这种新的并行方案，GMI-DRL引入了一个新概念——GPU复用实例（GMI），这是一种针对DRL扩展中的异构任务的统一资源可调整的子GPU设计。此外，GMI-DRL 引入了自适应协调器来有效管理工作负载和资源，以获得更好的系统性能。 GMI-DRL还集成了专用通信器，具有高效的GMI间通信支持，以满足多样化的通信需求。大量实验表明，GMI-DRL 在 DGX-A100 平台上的训练吞吐量（高达 2.34 倍）和 GPU 利用率（高达 40.8% 的提升）方面优于最先进的 DRL 加速解决方案。

items.title: GeneralSparse: Bridging the Gap in SpMM for Pruned Large Language Model Inference on GPUs.
items.abstract: The rapid growth of generative model parameters poses challenges in deployment, especially regarding weight storage and inference latency. The weight pruning is an effective technique to reduce the computational and memory overhead of Large Language Models (LLMs) while maintaining accuracy, which transforms the matmuls to Sparse Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) computation. However, the diverse pruning methods introduce varying sparsity patterns that challenge high-performance SpMM on GPUs. Existing solutions are limited with adaptability to these patterns, flexibility in handling different sparsity levels, and support for efficient optimizations. In this work, we present GeneralSparse, a novel solution that bridges this gap by leveraging the abstraction of memory access and reduction spaces. GeneralSparse designs the process of dividing box to adapt dynamically to diverse pruning patterns and proposes hierarchical reduction algorithms tailored to GPU hierarchies. Through evaluations on pruned LLM weight matrices and the SuiteSparse collection, GeneralSparse achieves up to 20.82× speedup over cuSPARSE libraries. At end-to-end inference time on LLMs, GeneralSparse achieves up to 2.33× speedup over counterparts.
items.abstract_zh: 生成模型参数的快速增长给部署带来了挑战，特别是在权重存储和推理延迟方面。权重剪枝是一种有效的技术，可以减少大型语言模型 (LLM) 的计算和内存开销，同时保持准确性，将 matmul 转换为稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 计算。然而，不同的剪枝方法引入了不同的稀疏模式，对 GPU 上的高性能 SpMM 提出了挑战。现有的解决方案在对这些模式的适应性、处理不同稀疏级别的灵活性以及对高效优化的支持方面受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GeneralSparse，这是一种新颖的解决方案，它通过利用内存访问和缩减空间的抽象来弥补这一差距。 GeneralSparse 设计了划分框的过程以动态适应不同的剪枝模式，并提出适合 GPU 层次结构的层次缩减算法。通过对修剪后的 LLM 权重矩阵和 SuiteSparse 集合进行评估，GeneralSparse 比 cuSPARSE 库实现了高达 20.82 倍的加速。在 LLM 的端到端推理时间上，GeneralSparse 比同类产品实现了高达 2.33 倍的加速。

items.title: KVCache Cache in the Wild: Characterizing and Optimizing KVCache Cache at a Large Cloud Provider.
items.abstract: Serving large language models (LLMs) is important for cloud providers, and caching intermediate results (KV$) after processing each request substantially improves serving throughput and latency. However, there is limited understanding of how LLM serving benefits from KV$ caching, where system design decisions like cache eviction policies are highly workload-dependent. In this paper, we present the first systematic characterization of the KV$ workload patterns from one of the leading LLM service providers. We draw observations that were not covered by previous studies focusing on synthetic workloads, including: KV$ reuses are skewed across requests, where reuses between single-turn requests are equally important as multi-turn requests; the reuse time and probability are diverse considering all requests, but for a specific request category, the pattern tends to be predictable; and the overall cache size required for an ideal cache hit ratio is moderate. Based on the characterization, we further propose a workload-aware cache eviction policy that improves the serving performance under real-world traces, especially with limited cache capacity.
items.abstract_zh: 为大型语言模型 (LLM) 提供服务对于云提供商而言非常重要，并且在处理每个请求后缓存中间结果 (KV$) 可以显着提高服务吞吐量和延迟。然而，对于 LLM 服务如何从 KV$ 缓存中受益的理解有限，其中缓存逐出策略等系统设计决策高度依赖于工作负载。在本文中，我们首次系统地描述了领先的 LLM 服务提供商之一的 KV$ 工作负载模式。我们得出了以前针对合成工作负载的研究未涵盖的观察结果，包括： KV$ 重用在请求之间存在偏差，其中单轮请求之间的重用与多轮请求之间的重用同等重要；考虑到所有请求，重用时间和概率是不同的，但对于特定的请求类别，该模式往往是可预测的；理想的缓存命中率所需的总体缓存大小是适中的。基于特征，我们进一步提出了一种工作负载感知的缓存驱逐策略，该策略可以提高现实世界跟踪下的服务性能，特别是在缓存容量有限的情况下。

items.title: Colocating ML Inference and Training with Fast GPU Memory Handover.
items.abstract: This paper presents SIRIUS, an efficient colocation system that enables spatial sharing of GPU resources between machine learning (ML) inference and training tasks. To meet strict latency SLOs, SIRIUS prioritizes inference tasks, allowing them to utilize all GPU resources without restriction and interference. Meanwhile, it concurrently runs training tasks on leftover resources to improve throughput and GPU utilization. SIRIUS is novel in three ways. First, it leverages the characteristics of gradient computation in a batch to adjust the memory consumption of training tasks in a few milliseconds. Second, it explicitly manages memory reclamation for training, ensuring a thorough and safe memory handover process. Third, it employs an SLO-aware memory reallocation strategy to mitigate memory initialization overhead and prevent thrashing when facing frequently fluctuating workloads. Our evaluation shows that SIRIUS outperforms existing state-of-the-art colocation approaches, improving inference SLO compliance by an average of 57.0% (up to 97.0%) and training throughput by 2.2× (up to 13.7×).
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SIRIUS，这是一种高效的主机托管系统，可实现机器学习 (ML) 推理和训练任务之间 GPU 资源的空间共享。为了满足严格的延迟 SLO，SIRIUS 优先考虑推理任务，使它们能够不受限制和干扰地利用所有 GPU 资源。同时，它在剩余资源上同时运行训练任务，以提高吞吐量和 GPU 利用率。 SIRIUS 在三个方面都很新颖。首先，它利用批量梯度计算的特点，在几毫秒内调整训练任务的内存消耗。其次，它显式管理训练的内存回收，确保内存切换过程彻底且安全。第三，它采用 SLO 感知内存重新分配策略来减轻内存初始化开销并防止在面对频繁波动的工作负载时出现抖动。我们的评估表明，SIRIUS 的性能优于现有最先进的托管方法，将推理 SLO 合规性平均提高了 57.0%（高达 97.0%），将训练吞吐量提高了 2.2 倍（高达 13.7 倍）。

items.title: LogCrisp: Fast Aggregated Analysis on Large-scale Compressed Logs by Enabling Two-Phase Pattern Extraction and Vectorized Queries.
items.abstract: Cloud providers generate logs at massive scales, often requiring dense compression using log patterns. Meanwhile, aggregated analysis on logs is essential for various applications. However, performing aggregated analysis on highly compressed logs presents two fundamental challenges: 1) it is hard to extract a set of log patterns that have both a global description and high filtering effectiveness; 2) executing full-text queries on numerically encoded data is challenging. This paper proposes a two-phase pattern extraction paradigm. Such a paradigm decouples messages within patterns into Sketch (global pattern structure) and Specs (local fine-grained pattern specifications). The Sketch is extracted in an offline phase to provide a comprehensive global description, while the Specs are customized in the online phase to enhance pattern filtering effectiveness. Additionally, this paper proposes an efficient prefix/suffix vectorized query algorithm for numerically encoded data, which leverages AVX SIMD instructions to convert full-text queries into high-performance range/point queries. We implement and integrate all these techniques into a system called LogCrisp, which is evaluated using nearly 7TB of logs from both production environments and public datasets. Experimental results show that LogCrisp achieves an order of magnitude lower analysis latency, 3.8× higher ingestion speed, and an almost identical compression ratio, compared with state-of-the-art works.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商大规模生成日志，通常需要使用日志模式进行密集压缩。同时，日志的聚合分析对于各种应用来说也是必不可少的。然而，对高度压缩的日志进行聚合分析存在两个基本挑战：1）很难提取一组既具有全局描述又具有高过滤效率的日志模式； 2）对数字编码数据执行全文查询具有挑战性。本文提出了一种两阶段模式提取范式。这种范例将模式内的消息解耦为 Sketch（全局模式结构）和 Specs（局部细粒度模式规范）。 Sketch是在离线阶段提取的，以提供全面的全局描述，而Specs是在在线阶段定制的，以增强模式过滤的有效性。此外，本文提出了一种针对数字编码数据的高效前缀/后缀矢量化查询算法，该算法利用 AVX SIMD 指令将全文查询转换为高性能范围/点查询。我们将所有这些技术实施并集成到一个名为 LogCrisp 的系统中，该系统使用来自生产环境和公共数据集的近 7TB 日志进行评估。实验结果表明，与最先进的作品相比，LogCrisp 的分析延迟降低了一个数量级，摄取速度提高了 3.8 倍，压缩比几乎相同。

items.title: Separate but Together: Integrating Remote Attestation into TLS.
items.abstract: Confidential computing based on Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) allows software to run on remote servers without trusting the administrator. Remote attestation offers verifiable proof of the software stack and hardware elements comprising the TEE. However, setting up a secure channel to such a TEE requires a security guarantee that the channel actually terminates inside the TEE. TLS is an existing protocol for secure channel establishment, and in its most common use on the Web, it uses a key pair to assert the server identity encoded in a certificate. Various approaches have been proposed to integrate remote attestation into TLS. Unfortunately, they all have shortcomings. In this paper, we present a protocol that combines the existing certificate-based assurances of TLS with remote attestation-based assurances in a way that they can be deployed independently and can fail independently. We design these two assurances to be additive without relying on each other, a property that has not been considered by existing approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 基于可信执行环境（TEE）的机密计算允许软件在远程服务器上运行而无需信任管理员。远程认证提供构成 TEE 的软件堆栈和硬件元素的可验证证明。然而，建立到此类 TEE 的安全通道需要安全保证，确保该通道实际上终止于 TEE 内部。 TLS 是用于建立安全通道的现有协议，在 Web 上最常见的用途是，它使用密钥对来断言证书中编码的服务器身份。人们提出了各种方法将远程认证集成到 TLS 中。不幸的是，它们都有缺点。在本文中，我们提出了一种协议，它将现有的基于证书的 TLS 保证与基于远程证明的保证相结合，使得它们可以独立部署并且可以独立失败。我们将这两种保证设计为相加的，而不相互依赖，这是现有方法尚未考虑的属性。

items.title: GREYHOUND: Hunting Fail-Slows in Hybrid-Parallel Training at Scale.
items.abstract: Fail-slows, or stragglers, are common problems in largescale hybrid-parallel training that runs on a large fleet of GPU servers for an extended period of time. Yet, these problems are not well studied. In this paper, we first present a characterization study on a shared production cluster with over 10,000 GPUs. We find that fail-slows manifest as transient stragglers caused by slow computations or communications due to contention, device degradation, or network congestion, lasting from sub-minutes to nearly ten hours, and delaying large training jobs by 1.34× on average. The current practice is to manually detect fail-slows and treat them as fail-stops by means of checkpoint-and-restart failover, which is time-consuming. In this paper, we propose GREYHOUND, a system that rapidly identifies slow GPUs and/or communication links, and effectively tackles them with a novel multi-level mitigation mechanism, all without human intervention. GREYHOUND correctly detects fail-slows in a production cluster with over 99% accuracy. Testbed experiment on 256 H800 GPUs further shows it effectively handles (manually injected) stragglers, improving end-to-end throughput by 1.58×.
items.abstract_zh: 失败缓慢或掉队是在大量 GPU 服务器上长时间运行的大规模混合并行训练中的常见问题。然而，这些问题还没有得到很好的研究。在本文中，我们首先对具有 10,000 多个 GPU 的共享生产集群进行表征研究。我们发现，故障缓慢表现为由于争用、设备性能下降或网络拥塞导致计算或通信缓慢而导致的短暂落后，持续时间从亚分钟到近十个小时，大型训练作业平均延迟 1.34 倍。目前的做法是通过检查点和重新启动故障转移的方式手动检测故障缓慢并将其视为故障停止，这非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了 GREYHOUND，这是一种能够快速识别慢速 GPU 和/或通信链路的系统，并通过新颖的多级缓解机制有效地解决它们，所有这些都无需人工干预。 GREYHOUND 能够正确检测生产集群中的故障缓慢，准确率超过 99%。在 256 个 H800 GPU 上进行的测试台实验进一步表明，它可以有效处理（手动注入）落后者，将端到端吞吐量提高 1.58 倍。

items.title: Turbocharge ANNS on Real Processing-in-Memory by Enabling Fine-Grained Per-PIM-Core Scheduling.
items.abstract: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) plays a key role in database and AI infrastructure. It exhibits extremely high memory intensity with a ∼1:1 compute-to-memory access ratio. Commodity Processing-in-Memory (PIM) hardware such as UPMEM is promising for overcoming the memory wall in ANNS. However, its reuse of the system DDR bus prevents the CPU and PIM cores from accessing memory simultaneously. This necessitates batch scheduling in existing systems, which, in turn, leads to severe underutilization in two scenarios: 1) inter-batch, where PIM remains idle while the CPU is copying data, and 2) intra-batch, caused by uneven load distribution of PIM cores in a batch. This paper proposes an efficient PIM-capable ANNS system named PIMANN. We observe that each PIM core has an additional, undocumented, and little-known control interface (originally used for control commands like launching PIM kernels), which could be retrofitted for fine-grained arbitration of DDR bus access. Thus, PIMANN can break the traditional batching scheduling paradigm and adopt a fine-grained, per-PIM-core scheduling paradigm. With this key idea, PIMANN introduces 1) persistent PIM kernel technique to eliminate the idle state between two batches, and 2) per-PU query dispatching technique that dispatches queries based on the real-time load of PIM cores. Experiments show that PIMANN can boost throughput by 2.4-10.4× compared to existing ANNS systems on CPU or GPU. The implementation of PIMANN is available at https://github.com/cds-ruc/PIM-ANNS .
items.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）在数据库和人工智能基础设施中发挥着关键作用。它表现出极高的内存强度，计算与内存访问比率约为 1:1。 UPMEM 等商品内存处理 (PIM) 硬件有望克服 ANNS 中的内存墙。然而，它对系统 DDR 总线的重用阻止了 CPU 和 PIM 内核同时访问内存。这需要在现有系统中进行批量调度，而这又会导致两种情况下的严重利用率不足：1）批次间，当CPU复制数据时，PIM保持空闲；2）批次内，由于批次中PIM核心的负载分布不均匀而导致。本文提出了一种高效的具有 PIM 功能的 ANNS 系统，称为 PIMANN。我们观察到每个 PIM 内核都有一个额外的、未记录的且鲜为人知的控制接口（最初用于启动 PIM 内核等控制命令），可以对其进行改造以实现 DDR 总线访问的细粒度仲裁。因此，PIMANN可以打破传统的批处理调度范式，采用细粒度的、每PIM核心的调度范式。基于这一关键思想，PIMANN 引入了 1）持久 PIM 内核技术，以消除两个批次之间的空闲状态，以及 2）每 PU 查询调度技术，根据 PIM 内核的实时负载调度查询。实验表明，与 CPU 或 GPU 上的现有 ANNS 系统相比，PIMANN 可以将吞吐量提高 2.4-10.4 倍。 PIMANN 的实现可在 https://github.com/cds-ruc/PIM-ANNS 上找到。

items.title: Unveiling Compiler Faults via Attribute-Guided Compilation Space Exploration.
items.abstract: Compiler testing is critically important, as compilers serve as the foundational infrastructure in system software development. A comprehensive exploration of the compilation space is essential for uncovering bugs in compilers. Existing methods primarily involve the utilization of various compilation options alongside test programs as inputs for stress-testing compilers. However, these compilation options are typically applied uniformly across all program elements-such as functions and variables–by default, limiting the ability to thoroughly explore the compilation space. In programming languages like C and C++, attributes such as the __attribute__((always_inline)) directive provide a mechanism for programmers to specify additional information for specific code elements to the compiler. These attributes allow for precise control over the compilation process, such as enforcing constraints and customizing optimization passes for particular elements. This flexibility in specifying attributes offers opportunities to investigate previously unexamined areas within compilers. Unfortunately, few studies have leveraged attributes for compiler testing. To this end, we propose ATLAS, an attribute-guided approach that strategically inserts attributes into test programs to facilitate a more thorough exploration of the compilation space. Our key insight is that attributes specified for individual program elements can provide a more flexible means of exploring the compilation space. Our extensive experiments on GCC and LLVM demonstrate the superiority of ATLAS over baseline testing techniques that do not employ attributes, particularly in terms of bug detection and code coverage. Furthermore, ATLAS has led to the discovery of 73 unique bugs in GCC and LLVM, 58 of which have already been confirmed or fixed, showcasing its practical utility.
items.abstract_zh: 编译器测试至关重要，因为编译器是系统软件开发的基础设施。全面探索编译空间对于发现编译器中的错误至关重要。现有方法主要涉及利用各种编译选项以及测试程序作为压力测试编译器的输入。然而，默认情况下，这些编译选项通常统一应用于所有程序元素（例如函数和变量），从而限制了彻底探索编译空间的能力。在 C 和 C++ 等编程语言中，诸如 __attribute__((always_inline)) 指令之类的属性为程序员提供了一种向编译器指定特定代码元素的附加信息的机制。这些属性允许对编译过程进行精确控制，例如强制约束和自定义特定元素的优化过程。这种指定属性的灵活性提供了研究编译器中以前未检查的领域的机会。不幸的是，很少有研究利用属性来进行编译器测试。为此，我们提出了 ATLAS，这是一种属性引导的方法，可以策略性地将属性插入到测试程序中，以促进对编译空间进行更彻底的探索。我们的主要见解是，为各个程序元素指定的属性可以提供更灵活的方式来探索编译空间。我们对 GCC 和 LLVM 进行的广泛实验证明了 ATLAS 相对于不使用属性的基线测试技术的优越性，特别是在错误检测和代码覆盖率方面。此外，ATLAS 在 GCC 和 LLVM 中发现了 73 个独特的错误，其中 58 个已被确认或修复，展示了其实用性。

items.title: PluS: Highly Efficient and Expandable ML Compiler with Pluggable Graph Schedules.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML) compilers are effective solutions for deploying diverse Deep Neural Network (DNN) workloads on various hardware platforms automatically. However, there is a notable lag in existing ML compilers when it comes to supporting emerging optimization techniques like recent attention optimizations. These compilers lack the requisite flexibility to support expert-driven subgraph optimizations timely, resulting in suboptimal performance compared to manually optimized libraries. Conversely, template-based compilers lack the ability to abstractly express subgraphs, thereby reducing their adaptability to subtle changes in model architectures. In this paper, we present PluS, an end-to-end ML compiler that facilitates the deployment of expert-optimized subgraph implementations while still preserving compiler flexibility. We rethink the encapsulation of ML compiler and decouple the burdensome embedded graph transformation process. PluS provides a lightweight loop-centric subgraph abstraction for experts to manage a flexible pattern warehouse, and employs a pattern identification approach for subgraph generation. As a result, PluS can deploy efficient subgraph implementations with minimal manual efforts, making it outperform the state-of-the-art rule-based embedded compilers (up to 4.04× speedup) on popular ML models.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 编译器是在各种硬件平台上自动部署各种深度神经网络 (DNN) 工作负载的有效解决方案。然而，现有的机器学习编译器在支持新兴的优化技术（例如最近的注意力优化）方面存在明显的滞后。这些编译器缺乏及时支持专家驱动的子图优化所需的灵活性，导致与手动优化的库相比性能不佳。相反，基于模板的编译器缺乏抽象表达子图的能力，从而降低了它们对模型架构细微变化的适应性。在本文中，我们提出了 PluS，一种端到端的机器学习编译器，它有助于部署专家优化的子图实现，同时仍然保留编译器的灵活性。我们重新思考机器学习编译器的封装，解耦繁琐的嵌入式图转换过程。 PluS 为专家提供了一个轻量级的以循环为中心的子图抽象来管理灵活的模式仓库，并采用模式识别方法来生成子图。因此，PluS 可以通过最少的手动工作来部署高效的子图实现，使其在流行的 ML 模型上优于最先进的基于规则的嵌入式编译器（高达 4.04 倍的加速）。

items.title: Voltrix: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication on Tensor Cores with Asynchronous and Balanced Kernel Optimization.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is crucial in scientific computing and machine learning. Despite advancements in GPU architectures, efficiently leveraging Tensor Cores for SpMM remains challenging. The core issue is the mismatch between the inherently sparse nature of the matrices and the dense computational patterns. Existing methods struggle with substantial overheads in loading data to computation units and cannot adequately manage data imbalance across computations, thereby limiting the high computational throughput potential of Tensor Cores. In this paper, we introduce Voltrix-SpMM, a revolutionary GPU kernel design that overcomes these challenges. First, we implement an asynchronous data loading pipeline that employs a bit-wise compressed format for sparse matrices and bulk memory copy instructions for dense matrices. This innovative design enables efficient data access and incorporates a warp-specialized producer-consumer model to seamlessly overlap data loading with computation. Second, we develop a persistent and I/O co-balanced kernel mechanism that features a two-stage partition strategy to achieve balance between input and output. Implemented with CUDA 12.6, Voltrix-SpMM substantially improves performance, delivering an average speedups of 36.5x and 1.8x over Tensor Core-based TC-GNN and DTC-SpMM respectively, and an average 1.7x speedup over the CUDA Core-based RoDe, fully unleashing the power of Tensor Cores for SpMM.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 在科学计算和机器学习中至关重要。尽管 GPU 架构取得了进步，但有效利用张量核心进行 SpMM 仍然具有挑战性。核心问题是矩阵固有的稀疏性质与密集的计算模式之间的不匹配。现有方法在将数据加载到计算单元时面临大量开销，并且无法充分管理计算之间的数据不平衡，从而限制了 Tensor Core 的高计算吞吐量潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了 Voltrix-SpMM，这是一种克服这些挑战的革命性 GPU 内核设计。首先，我们实现一个异步数据加载管道，该管道对稀疏矩阵采用按位压缩格式，对密集矩阵采用批量内存复制指令。这种创新设计实现了高效的数据访问，并结合了 Warp 专用的生产者-消费者模型，将数据加载与计算无缝重叠。其次，我们开发了持久性和 I/O 协同平衡的内核机制，该机制采用两阶段分区策略来实现输入和输出之间的平衡。 Voltrix-SpMM 采用 CUDA 12.6 实现，性能大幅提升，与基于 Tensor Core 的 TC-GNN 和 DTC-SpMM 平均加速分别为 36.5 倍和 1.8 倍，比基于 CUDA Core 的 RoDe 平均加速 1.7 倍，充分释放了 SpMM Tensor Core 的威力。

items.title: Revealing Floating-Point Accumulation Orders in Software/Hardware Implementations.
items.abstract: Accumulation-based operations, such as summation and matrix multiplication, are fundamental to numerous computational domains. However, their accumulation orders are often undocumented in existing software and hardware implementations, making it difficult for developers to ensure consistent results across systems. To address this issue, we introduce FPRev, a diagnostic tool designed to reveal the accumulation order in the software and hardware implementations through numerical testing. With FPRev, developers can identify and compare accumulation orders, enabling developers to create reproducible software and verify implementation equivalence. FPRev is a testing-based tool that non-intrusively reveals the accumulation order by analyzing the outputs of the tested implementation for distinct specially designed inputs. Employing FPRev, we showcase the accumulation orders of popular libraries (such as NumPy and PyTorch) on CPUs and GPUs (including GPUs with specialized matrix accelerators such as Tensor Cores). We also validate the efficiency of FPRev through extensive experiments. FPRev exhibits a lower time complexity compared to the basic solution. FPRev is open-sourced at https://github.com/peichenxie/FPRev .
items.abstract_zh: 基于累加的运算（例如求和和矩阵乘法）是许多计算领域的基础。然而，它们的累积顺序在现有软件和硬件实现中通常没有记录，这使得开发人员很难确保跨系统的结果一致。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 FPRev，这是一种诊断工具，旨在通过数值测试揭示软件和硬件实现中的累积顺序。借助 FPRev，开发人员可以识别和比较累积订单，从而使开发人员能够创建可复制的软件并验证实现的等效性。 FPRev 是一种基于测试的工具，通过分析不同的专门设计输入的测试实现的输出，以非侵入式方式揭示累积顺序。使用 FPRev，我们展示了流行库（例如 NumPy 和 PyTorch）在 CPU 和 GPU（包括具有专门矩阵加速器（例如 Tensor Core）的 GPU）上的累积顺序。我们还通过大量实验验证了 FPRev 的效率。与基本解决方案相比，FPRev 的时间复杂度较低。 FPRev 在 https://github.com/peichenxie/FPRev 上开源。

items.title: Roaming Free in the VR World with MP2.
items.abstract: Free-roaming VR which allows a group of users to navigate in rooms and even buildings, enhances the VR experience by making it more immersive and interactive. Streaming VR videos over wireless enables unconstrained experiences but raises unprecedented requirements in mobility, efficiency, and scalability. Existing solutions fail in one or more of the following challenges: maintaining low latency during handover, balancing loads on different APs, and stabilizing bitrate for competing users, due to their decentralized nature where each user lacks information about others and makes locally optimal decisions. To address these problems, we present MP 2 , a centralized VR streaming system that coordinates multiple Wi-Fi links and video bitrates among users for better QoE. A centralized controller collects cross-layer information from each user and makes better decisions based on global information. It achieves this in a timely manner through accurate modeling and the use of efficient pruning and partitioning algorithms. To our knowledge, MP 2 is the first centrally coordinated VR streaming system that supports multi-user free-roaming. Comprehensive benchmarks including real-world tests, large-scale emulation, and trace-driven user studies, confirm the effectiveness of MP 2 against state-of-the-art solutions. It achieves 35× improvement in tail latency, 1.56× in bitrate, and 1.86× in QoE over state-of-the-art baselines. MP 2 achieves up to a 99.1% improvement in mean opinion scores according to the user study.
items.abstract_zh: 自由漫游 VR 允许一组用户在房间甚至建筑物中导航，通过使其更加身临其境和互动来增强 VR 体验。通过无线传输 VR 视频可以实现不受限制的体验，但对移动性、效率和可扩展性提出了前所未有的要求。现有的解决方案在以下一个或多个挑战中失败：在切换期间保持低延迟、平衡不同接入点上的负载以及稳定竞争用户的比特率，这是由于其分散性，每个用户缺乏关于其他用户的信息并做出本地最优决策。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 MP 2，这是一种集中式 VR 流媒体系统，可协调用户之间的多个 Wi-Fi 链接和视频比特率，以实现更好的 QoE。集中控制器从每个用户收集跨层信息，并根据全局信息做出更好的决策。它通过准确的建模和使用高效的修剪和分区算法及时实现了这一点。据我们所知，MP 2是第一个支持多用户自由漫游的集中协调的VR流媒体系统。全面的基准测试（包括实际测试、大规模仿真和跟踪驱动的用户研究）证实了 MP 2 相对于最先进解决方案的有效性。与最先进的基准相比，它的尾部延迟提高了 35 倍，比特率提高了 1.56 倍，QoE 提高了 1.86 倍。根据用户研究，MP 2 的平均意见得分提高了 99.1%。

items.title: Bin2Wrong: a Unified Fuzzing Framework for Uncovering Semantic Errors in Binary-to-C Decompilers.
items.abstract: Binary decompilation is central to many systems tasks that rely on analyzing or modifying closed-source software, such as debugging, performance tuning, and security hardening. Decompilers translate executables into C code with the goal of reconstructing a semantically-equivalent form of the original program’s source. Unfortunately, when challenged by intricate program logic, data structures, and diverse executable layouts, decompilers often produce semantically-wrong code. Proactively detecting such decompilation defects is critical for ensuring the success of downstream tasks that depend on precise binary analysis. Yet, current methods for assessing decompiler correctness only narrowly explore the variety of source constructs, compilers, optimization levels, executable formats, and combinations thereof that influence binary code. Fully guaranteeing decompilation precision—and, by extension, supporting all tasks that hinge on accurate binary-to-source recovery—demands a testing approach that unifies all factors affecting binary code, extending practical, systematic correctness testing to all decompilers today. To accelerate discovery of decompilation defects, this paper introduces BIN2WRONG: a general-purpose decompiler fuzzer combining systematic binary mutation with practical, decompiler-agnostic support. Our approach coalesces all factors of binary generation—source, compiler, optimization, and executable format—into a novel, unified testcase structure for mutation. Beyond enabling deeper exploration along these individual dimensions, BIN2WRONG finds unique combinations exposing complex, multi-dimensional errors that elude prior decompiler testing approaches. In evaluating BIN2WRONG alongside state-of-the-art decompiler fuzzers Cornucopia and DecFuzzer across seven free and commercial decompilers, BIN2WRONG achieves upwards of 10.39× and 17.18× higher binary diversity and 1.16× and 1.32× more decompiler code coverage, respectively, whilst uncovering the most decompilation bugs. Beyond finding 48 new bugs, with 30 confirmed, BIN2WRONG spurred a major redesign of the commercial decompiler Binary Ninja—showing its utility in uncovering critical defects in mainstream decompilers.
items.abstract_zh: 二进制反编译是许多依赖于分析或修改闭源软件的系统任务的核心，例如调试、性能调整和安全强化。反编译器将可执行文件转换为 C 代码，目的是重建原始程序源代码的语义等效形式。不幸的是，当面临复杂的程序逻辑、数据结构和不同的可执行布局的挑战时，反编译器通常会产生语义错误的代码。主动检测此类反编译缺陷对于确保依赖于精确二进制分析的下游任务的成功至关重要。然而，当前用于评估反编译器正确性的方法仅狭隘地探索影响二进制代码的各种源构造、编译器、优化级别、可执行格式及其组合。充分保证反编译精度，并进一步支持所有依赖于准确的二进制到源代码恢复的任务，需要一种测试方法来统一影响二进制代码的所有因素，将实用的、系统的正确性测试扩展到当今的所有反编译器。为了加速发现反编译缺陷，本文引入了 BIN2WRONG：一种通用反编译器模糊器，将系统二进制突变与实用的、与反编译器无关的支持相结合。我们的方法将二进制生成的所有因素（源、编译器、优化和可执行格式）合并成一个新颖的、统一的测试用例结构以进行突变。除了能够沿着这些单独的维度进行更深入的探索之外，BIN2WRONG 还发现了独特的组合，这些组合暴露了以前的反编译器测试方法无法识别的复杂的多维错误。在通过七个免费和商业反编译器对 BIN2WRONG 与最先进的反编译器模糊器 Cornucopia 和 DecFuzzer 进行评估时，BIN2WRONG 的二进制多样性分别提高了 10.39 倍和 17.18 倍，反编译器代码覆盖率分别提高了 1.16 倍和 1.32 倍，同时发现了最多的反编译错误。除了发现 48 个新错误（已确认 30 个）之外，BIN2WRONG 还促使商业反编译器 Binary Ninja 进行了重大重新设计，展示了其在发现主流反编译器中的关键缺陷方面的实用性。

items.title: ShieldReduce: Fine-Grained Shielded Data Reduction.
items.abstract: Storage savings and data confidentiality are two primary yet conflicting goals in outsourced backup management. While deduplication-aware encryption has been extensively studied to make deduplication viable for encrypted data, it is incompatible with fine-grained delta and local compression for further storage savings. We present ShieldReduce, a secure outsourced storage system that aims for fine-grained shielded data reduction by applying deduplication, delta compression, and local compression to data in a trusted execution environment based on Intel SGX, so as to achieve high storage savings with security guarantees. To mitigate the I/Os of accessing base chunks for delta compression in SGX, ShieldReduce adopts bi-directional delta compression via a novel hybrid inline and offline compression design to maintain the physical locality of base chunks. Evaluation on various backup workloads shows that ShieldReduce achieves significant speedups over a shielded baseline without bi-directional delta compression, while maintaining comparable storage savings to fine-grained data reduction for plain data.
items.abstract_zh: 存储节省和数据机密性是外包备份管理中两个主要但相互冲突的目标。虽然重复数据删除感知加密已被广泛研究以使重复数据删除适用于加密数据，但它与细粒度增量和本地压缩不兼容，以进一步节省存储空间。我们推出了安全外包存储系统ShieldReduce，旨在通过在基于Intel SGX的可信执行环境中对数据应用重复数据删除、增量压缩和本地压缩，实现细粒度的屏蔽数据缩减，从而在安全保证的情况下实现高存储节省。为了减少在 SGX 中访问基本块进行增量压缩的 I/O，ShieldReduce 通过新颖的混合内联和离线压缩设计采用双向增量压缩，以维护基本块的物理局部性。对各种备份工作负载的评估表明，与没有双向增量压缩的屏蔽基线相比，ShieldReduce 实现了显着的加速，同时保持了与普通数据的细粒度数据缩减相当的存储节省。

items.title: Cosmic: Cost-Effective Support for Cloud-Assisted 3D Printing.
items.abstract: In this paper, we consider a new workload for which serverless platforms are well-suited: the execution of a 3D printer controller in the cloud. This workload is qualitatively different from those considered in prior work due to the stringent timing requirements. Our measurements on popular serverless platforms reveal millisecond-level overheads that impair the timely execution of the example control algorithm we consider. To mitigate the impact of these overheads, we judiciously partition the execution of the algorithm across a set of serverless functions and exploit timely speculation. Our evaluations on AWS Lambda show that, for 30 diverse print jobs, Cosmic is able to ensure the timely execution of the controller while reducing cost by 2.8x–3.5x compared to other approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了无服务器平台非常适合的新工作负载：在云中执行 3D 打印机控制器。由于严格的时间要求，此工作量与先前工作中考虑的工作量有质的不同。我们对流行的无服务器平台的测量表明，毫秒级的开销会影响我们考虑的示例控制算法的及时执行。为了减轻这些开销的影响，我们明智地将算法的执行划分为一组无服务器函数，并利用及时的推测。我们对 AWS Lambda 的评估表明，对于 30 种不同的打印作业，Cosmic 能够确保控制器的及时执行，同时与其他方法相比，成本降低了 2.8 倍至 3.5 倍。

items.title: PageFlex: Flexible and Efficient User-space Delegation of Linux Paging Policies with eBPF.
items.abstract: To increase platform memory efficiency, hyperscalers like Google and Meta transparently demote "cold" application data to cheaper cost-per-byte memory tiers like compressed memory and NVMe SSDs. These systems rely on standard kernel paging policies and mechanisms to maximize the achievable memory savings without hurting application performance. Although the literature promises better policies, implementing and deploying them within the Linux kernel is challenging. Delegating policies and mechanisms to user space, through userfaultfd or library-based approaches, incurs overheads and may require modifying application code. We present PageFlex, a framework for delegating Linux paging policies to user space with minimal overhead and full compatibility with existing real-world deployments. PageFlex uses eBPF to delegate policy decisions while providing low-overhead access to in-kernel memory state and access information, thus balancing flexibility and performance. Additionally, PageFlex supports different paging strategies for distinct memory regions and application phases. We show that PageFlex can delegate existing kernel-based policies with little (< 1%) application slowdown, effectively realizing the benefits of state-of-the-art policies like Hyperbolic caching and Leap prefetching, and unlocking application-specific benefits through region- and phase-aware policy specialization.
items.abstract_zh: 为了提高平台内存效率，Google 和 Meta 等超大规模企业透明地将“冷”应用程序数据降级为更便宜的每字节成本内存层，例如压缩内存和 NVMe SSD。这些系统依靠标准内核分页策略和机制来最大限度地节省内存，而不损害应用程序性能。尽管文献承诺有更好的策略，但在 Linux 内核中实施和部署它们仍然具有挑战性。通过 userfaultfd 或基于库的方法将策略和机制委托给用户空间会产生开销，并且可能需要修改应用程序代码。我们推出了 PageFlex，这是一个以最小的开销将 Linux 分页策略委托给用户空间的框架，并且与现有的实际部署完全兼容。 PageFlex 使用 eBPF 来委托策略决策，同时提供对内核内存状态和信息的低开销访问，从而平衡灵活性和性能。此外，PageFlex 支持针对不同内存区域和应用程序阶段的不同分页策略。我们表明，PageFlex 可以委派现有的基于内核的策略，而应用程序速度几乎不会降低 (< 1%)，有效实现双曲线缓存和 Leap 预取等最先进策略的优势，并通过区域和阶段感知策略专业化释放特定于应用程序的优势。

items.title: HEC: Equivalence Verification Checking for Code Transformation via Equality Saturation.
items.abstract: In modern computing systems, compilation employs numerous optimization techniques to enhance code performance.
